title: Trump and Xi Enter China Summit Distracted by Iran War
summary_full: The war in Iran has cast a shadow of uncertainty on both superpowers, dimming early hopes that they could begin to address the larger issues that have frayed their relationship.
summary_public: The war in Iran has cast a shadow of uncertainty on both superpowers, dimming early hopes that they could begin to address the larger issues that have frayed their relationship.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: The war in Iran has cast a shadow of uncertainty
